  wd:Q62894817 wdt:P50 ?book.

  ?book wdt:P1476 ?title;
        wdt:P577 ?date.
  FILTER(LANG(?title) = 'en')
}
GROUP BY ?book ?title
ORDER BY ?publicationDate
LIMIT 1
